data.title: "North America Web App Firewall market to grow from USD 2.13B in 2024 to USD 6.65B by 2033 due to cybersecurity threats and web-based apps surge - ResearchAndMarkets.com"
data.description: A report titled "North America Web Application Firewall Market Size and Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for Web Application Firewalls (WAF) in North America is projected to witness significant growth, with expectations to rise from USD 2.13 billion in 2024 to USD 6.65 billion by 2033. This surge in the market can be attributed to the increasing number of cybersecurity threats, a notable increase in web-based applications, and the enforcement of strict data protection regulations. Companies operating across various industries are likely to benefit from this growth trend.

data.title: Themes ETFs has relaunched the Humanoid Robotics ETF (Ticker: BOTT) on NASDAQ, offering exposure to leading robot companies with a low expense ratio of 0.35%.
data.description: A corporation based in Greenwich, Connecticut, disclosed on August 19, 2025, the re-launch of the Themes Humanoid Robotics ETF under the ticker symbol BOTT. This ETF aims to provide cost-effective investment opportunities in businesses spearheading the advancement of humanoid robots, autonomous technologies for various sectors like industry and logistics, healthcare support technologies, and the artificial intelligence and computing frameworks that power next-generation robotics. BOTT will be available for trading on NASDAQ with an exceptionally low expense ratio of 0.35%.

data.title: Inspira receives $27M order from African Ministry of Health for ART100 Systems, with full payment in 2025.
data.description: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., a leading innovator in life-support and diagnostic technologies based in Ra'anana, Israel, revealed on August 19, 2025, that they have received a lucrative deal from a national ministry of health in Africa. The Ministry of Health has placed a substantial $27 million binding purchase order for Inspira’s FDA-cleared ART100 systems. This significant order was facilitated through Inspira’s exclusive distribution partner, responsible for the commercialization of the company’s products. The agreement marks the beginning of a comprehensive nationwide deployment initiative for these life-saving medical systems.

data.title: RealSense & NVIDIA partner to advance Physical AI for robotics, integrating RealSense AI depth cameras with NVIDIA Jetson Thor Series & Isaac Sim.
data.description: RealSense, Inc., a top company in robotic perception, revealed a new partnership with NVIDIA in San Francisco. This collaboration aims to enhance physical AI in humanoids and autonomous mobile robots. By combining RealSense's AI depth cameras with NVIDIA's robotics platforms like the NVIDIA Jetson Thor Series, they seek to boost the adoption and functionalities of robots. NVIDIA's Isaac Sim will also play a key role in creating digital twins for efficient testing. This move is expected to significantly advance the capabilities of AI in robotics.

data.title: Nugen raises pre-seed funding to advance AI for businesses. Mission: make AI reliable.
data.description: In Mumbai, India and San Francisco, a company called Nugen has revealed that it has secured funding in a pre-seed round. This funding will be used to further their goal of enhancing the dependability of artificial intelligence for businesses. The exact amount of funding has not been disclosed.

data.title: US stocks mixed; Dow falls over 150 points. Dow at 45,447.15 (-0.40%), NASDAQ at 21,550.35 (+0.25%), S&P 500 at 6,462.28 (-0.07%).
data.description: In the US, stock markets showed a mixed trend today. The Dow Jones index declined by over 150 points, reaching 45,447.15, down 0.40%. Conversely, the NASDAQ saw a 0.25% increase, reaching 21,550.35. The S&P 500 also witnessed a drop, falling by 0.07% to 6,462.28. Communication services shares recorded a 0.7% increase, while consumer staples stocks fell by 1.2% on Monday. PDD Holdings (NASDAQ: PDD) reported positive fiscal second-quarter 2025 results, with revenue growing by 7% YoY to $14.52 billion (103.98 billion Chinese yuan). The adjusted earnings per ADS were $3.08 (22.07 Chinese yuan), surpassing analysts' estimates. For further details, the entire article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SPIE acquires Voets & Donkers in Netherlands, enhancing its position in industrial technology. Strengthening expertise in cooling and air handling.
data.description: On August 25th, 2025, SPIE, a prominent European provider of multi-technical services in energy and communications, announced the acquisition of Voets & Donkers Koeltechniek B.V. and VND Technical Services B.V. This move aims to enhance SPIE's capabilities in industrial cooling installations, air treatment systems, heat pumps, industrial automation, and process equipment engineering. This strategic acquisition underscores SPIE's commitment to expanding its expertise in critical sectors.

data.title: NielsenIQ (NIQ) extends strategic agreement with Sally Beauty, providing key account trade area data and consumer insights.
data.description: NielsenIQ (NIQ) (NYSE: NIQ), a prominent consumer intelligence company, has declared an extended and upgraded partnership with Sally Beauty, a top specialty beauty retailer and distributor of professional-grade beauty items. Under this multi-year deal, NIQ will remain the exclusive supplier of essential account trade area data for brand allies of Sally Beauty, and will also persist as the primary provider of consumer insights for Sally Beauty using their panel.

data.title: North America Athletic Wear Market to reach US$ 48.63 billion by 2033, growing at 7.48% rate, driven by health awareness and sustainability.
data.description: Dublin - The latest report titled "North America Athletic Wear Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. In 2024, the North America Athletic Wear Market reached a value of US$ 25.44 billion. It is projected to grow at a rate of 7.48% from 2025 to 2033, with an estimated market value of US$ 48.63 billion by 2033. This growth can be attributed to the increasing health awareness, rising participation in sports and exercise activities, and the rising demand for athletic wear.

data.title: Luvme Hair launches all-in-one wig tutorial for easy styling with diverse styles and summer savings.
data.description: Leading beauty company Luvme Hair has recently introduced a comprehensive line of wig solutions, featuring a wide range of styles and exclusive summer discounts. The New York-based company, renowned for their high-quality human hair lace wigs and extensions, has launched an all-inclusive wig collection aiming to provide customers with effortless beauty options. The product line includes a diverse selection of styles to cater to various preferences, while also offering irresistible savings for the summer season. This move by Luvme Hair aligns with their commitment to offering premium beauty solutions to customers.
